locations.name: Bahen 1F
locations.brief_description: You are on the first floor of the Bahen Center. There are elevators to the West, and an exit from the building to St. George street to the East. You see something shiny on the ground -- looks like a toonie?
locations.long_description: You are on the first floor of the Bahen Center. It's usually crowded at this time of the day, but today it's eerily quiet. Only a few students are studying at the table near the doors. You better not disturb them. One student is rushing down the corridor, wearing a heavy-looking backpack and carrying a textbook in their arms. There are elevators to the West, and an exit from the building to St. George street to the East.

locations.name: St. George Street
locations.brief_description: You are outside on St. George Street.
locations.long_description: You are walking along St. George Street. It's a brisk winter day. To the West is the Bahen Center. To the North is Robarts Library. To the East is Cafe Reznikoff.

locations.name: Robarts Library
locations.brief_description: You are in the main lobby of Robarts Library.
locations.long_description: You are in the main lobby of Robarts Library. The sheer size of the concrete turkey looms over you. Students are rushing in and out. To the South is St. George Street. To the East is Morrison Hall.

locations.name: Morrison Hall
locations.brief_description: You are in your room at Morrison Hall.
locations.long_description: You are in your dorm room at Morrison Hall. Your desk is messy with MAT137 problemsets and energy drinks. This is where you need to be to submit your project! To the West is Robarts Library.

locations.name: Cafe Reznikoff
locations.long_description: You are at Cafe Reznikoff. The smell of fresh coffee and pastries fills the air. It's a great place to take a break, but you have no time for a break! To the West is St. George Street.

items.name: toonie
items.description: There is a toonie on the ground. Someone must have dropped it.

items.name: usb drive
items.description: Your precious USB drive containing the only copy of your game!

items.name: laptop charger
items.description: Your laptop charger. You won't last long without it.

items.name: lucky mug
items.description: Your lucky U of T mug.
